name: Anel Elektrik Proje Taahhut ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
summary: Anel Elektrik Proje Taahh√É¬ºt ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, provides mechanical, electrical, and plumbing engineering (MEP) services. The company operates through Project Commitment, Rent of Land and Buildings, Telecommunications, Ship Electrical and Electronics, and Energy segments. It provides solutions in the area of MEP operation and maintenance, low voltage panel production, recycling, and ship electric and electronic systems. The company undertakes various electrical and mechanical contracting projects, including airports, stadiums, rail systems, data centers, hospitals, hotels, business centers, and shopping centers. It also produces electrical energy from solar energy projects, as well as engages in the telecommunication activities. In addition, the company purchases and sells immovable property; and involved in Electricity and Electromechanical Contracting activities. Further, it offers designing, contracting, and maintenance repair services. The company operates in Turkey, Qatar, England, Holland, Russia, Bulgaria, Azerbaijan, and the United Arab Emirates. Anel Elektrik Proje Taahh√É¬ºt ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
